category_sources: source_facts.description says iceberg-cli is a command-line interface for Apache Iceberg.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies the project as the command-line interface for Apache Iceberg.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official go.iceberg.apache.org CLI documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains an official repository URL, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Apache Iceberg CLI; source_facts.repo points to apache/iceberg-go.
